mapper.select:
SELECT w.id, w.user_id, w.asset_id, w.create_time, a.symbol, a.full_name, a.asset_type, a.current_price FROM user_watchlist w INNER JOIN asset_info a ON w.asset_id = a.id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND w.is_deleted = 0 AND a.is_deleted = 0
AND ( a.symbol LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY w.create_time DESC
